headline: J.B. Hunt Announces Anticipated Dual Listing on Nasdaq Texas Stock Exchange
summary: SAN ANTONIO, March 05, 2026--J.B. Hunt Transport Services, Inc. (Nasdaq: JBHT) today announced that it has been approved to have its common stock dually listed on Nasdaq Texas, LLC (Nasdaq Texas). J.B. Hunt President and CEO Shelley Simpson joined key industry and Nasdaq leaders and Texas state officials at today’s closing bell ceremony commemorating the launch of the Nasdaq Texas exchange.

headline: Nasdaq Texas Launches with Inaugural Dual Listings
